updates.tweet_text:
Untradable conditions. Do not trade until we get a clear burst of volatility (hard sell). #ES_F still drifting from last Wednesday's 730pm 7311 Failed Breakdown/institutional buy.

7611 was most recent support, held last eve. 7639, 7650, 7672 above. 7590 (watch traps) below 7611 https://t.co/0RSSOq7ccE
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7311, 7611, 7639, 7650, 7672, 7590) are either morning-plan levels, observations of prior action, or directional lists — no new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: NOTE: ES is rolling over from June 2026 front month (ESM2026) to September front month contract (ESU2026).  These levels are now all September. June will expire Friday June 19th and stop trading completely but as the week goes on volume will transfer to September
updates.notes: Tweet is an administrative note about contract rollover from ESM2026 to ESU2026; no actionable price levels named.

updates.tweet_text: @lohaloha123 The two paragraphs below that go into more specific detail about exactly what to look for in terms of number of points and time. Rips through always means higher though
updates.notes: Reply tweet explaining methodology/context only; no specific price named or actionable level introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @SunTrader777 Should be enough to get people talking on social media. Often top callers appearing in comments, people asking "what happened" etc. Usually 40-200 points elevator down

updates.tweet_text: @SunTrader777 For today I'd want to see 7590 at least
updates.notes: 7590 is already in the morning plan. This is a reaffirmation in reply to a user, not a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text:
Minature volatility expansion now in #ES_F.. Upside continues from last Wednesday's 7311 Failed Breakdown long/institutional accumulation event. 7611 was support. Held last evening, now back again, but used up.

7590 below (watch traps of this zone), then 7570, 7545. https://t.co/NCSIgdhHJp
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7611, 7590, 7570, 7545) are in the morning plan. Tweet is observational/reaffirming existing levels, no new actionable levels named.

updates.notes: 7611 is already in today's morning plan. Tweet is a conversational reply explaining structure context, not a new actionable level call.

updates.tweet_text:
Volatility still low as we now chop around 7611. This was support given at 3pm yesterday and it held at 6pm precisely. Now, its a used up zone. Extremely bullish if #ES_F can push through this.

Otherwise, 7590 below (huge level, watch traps here). 7620, 7628, 7639+ above now https://t.co/Tiy74OA2Q8
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7611, 7590, 7620, 7628, 7639) are either morning-plan levels or observations/directional lists without new actionable naming language.

updates.tweet_text:
Tons of slow chop in #ES_F (summer trading, holiday week + last Wednesday we had a massive institutional accumulation event on the 7310 Failed Breakdown). 7611 remains a magnet. 7620 1st up - just hit, and its a ceiling for hours.

7628, 7639, then 7660+. 7590 remains very key https://t.co/gkih3jOr4i
updates.notes: 7628 and 7660+ named as next upside targets in sequence ('7628, 7639, then 7660+'); 7628/7660 not in morning plan. 7639/7590/7611/7620 are morning-plan reaffirmations.

updates.tweet_text: @MizuTraderr Thats part of it but the technicals matter too. We had a huge Failed Breakdown last Wednesday after a volatile window and that brings volatility way down in general.

updates.tweet_text: @bryce_schilling Not much! Do some charting, work on levels for the next few days, tweet updates here

updates.tweet_text: @PeriHelion96002 @bryce_schilling Probably about a week. It happens in these very bullish periods. In very volatile periods I may be trading 3x a day. In periods like this sometimes days go by

updates.tweet_text: @fiveinchhammer 7601 was a support I had in newsletter also, very mild but ES can't even lose that one!

updates.tweet_text: Closing Update #ES_F: No volatility day. 7590 will be key support this evening/later in the session and bulls want to hold it (or quick trap below). If they can't a deeper retrace becomes more likely. Bulls fully control above as we are flagging. Newsletter out soon with entries
updates.notes: 7590 is already in the morning plan. No new prices introduced; tweet is a reaffirmation/closing commentary on existing level.

updates.tweet_text: @HagglundKirk Barely but at least the range expanded abit!
updates.notes: Reply tweet with no price levels mentioned at all; purely conversational commentary about range expansion.

updates.tweet_text: @PermaFader There is a whole structure there that has to be taken into consideration. There's a single low at 82 but theres a shelf right next to it at 90. If you wait for 82 to sweep then long, you still need that 90 shelf to recover too
updates.notes: Conversational reply describing price structure observation around 7482/7490; no explicit actionable naming language used, just explaining conditions to another user.

updates.tweet_text: @305HRHitter @PermaFader Yes for sure - that met all the criteria

updates.tweet_text: @305HRHitter @PermaFader There was that small shelf at 7600 , in hindsight the trigger there should've been above that shelf

updates.tweet_text:
Volatility remains low in (holiday week, FOMC today, #ES_F). I posted yesterday 7590 was 1st support of interest, and watch traps there. We trapped it all eve, popped to 7611 target

Plan today: ES is tired. 7600 must reclaim to see 7611, 7621, 7640. 7570 fails, dip 7545-50, 7536 https://t.co/QWOEyluFQo
updates.notes: 7600 named as must-reclaim trigger for bull targets; 7536 named as new bear dip target below 7570 fail — neither in morning plan.

updates.tweet_text: Note: This is obviously ES September contract now. Volatility remains extremely low here and ES is tired/likely needs to correct and consolidate now. FOMC at 2pm will be key. No rallies today until 7600 recovers
updates.notes: 7600 is in the morning plan. Commentary is directional context/observation, not a new actionable level introduction.
